title: Transfer security thresholds
body: Payments and money transfers must be evaluated by amount, beneficiary, pattern novelty, and reversibility. A transfer to an account or savings pot already owned by the same customer may be proposed by the agent. If the amount exceeds the configured risk limit for the customer profile, if the beneficiary is new, or if the pattern is anomalous compared with history, the system must require explicit approval or step-up authentication according to the current risk route. The AI model cannot autonomously authorize money movement.

title: Savings optimization guidelines
body: The agent may propose liquidity optimizations when it detects idle balance after salary credit, provided it verifies expected outflows over the next 30 days and active savings goals. The customer must see the proposed amount, projected balance after the action, reason for the proposal, and risk level. Movements to existing savings pots are considered medium risk when they exceed the customer's autonomous limit.

title: Grounding and anti-hallucination policy
body: Balances, amounts, transactions, beneficiaries, and ledger state must come exclusively from Bank Data APIs or controlled read models. Document retrieval may be used for policies and product descriptions, but must never be used as the source of truth for financial numbers. If requested data is unavailable, the agent must state uncertainty and must not invent values.

title: Customer notifications policy
body: For actions proposed by the agent, the customer must receive clear communication in the preferred channel. Notifications must distinguish between proposal, approved action, low-risk autonomous action, and blocked action. For actions that require approval, the message must include reason, amount, source account, destination, and the ability to modify or reject.

title: Shared-account authorization policy
body: For joint or shared accounts, the system must verify multi-principal authorization rules. If a policy requires co-approval, the agent may prepare the proposal but cannot execute it until all required approvers have confirmed. In conflicting preferences, the most conservative rule prevails.

title: Legacy autonomous transfer limit
body: Stale policy: transfers below EUR 1000 may be executed autonomously by the agent without customer approval. This policy has been replaced by doc_transfer_security_thresholds_v2 and must be ignored by retrieval.
